title: Accounting, BS
markdown_content:
# Accounting, BS

The Accounting, BS program builds practical knowledge in financial reporting, managerial accounting, taxation, auditing concepts, and business decision-making.

## Program overview

Students learn how accounting information supports planning, controls, compliance, and ethical decisions. Coursework combines core business study with accounting practice and communication.

## What you will study

- Financial and managerial accounting
- Taxation and audit concepts
- Accounting information systems
- Business law and ethics
- Data-informed reporting

## Format and pacing

The program is offered online and on campus. Full-time students usually take two courses in an online term or a standard campus load during a semester; transfer credit may change the remaining timeline.

## Related programs

Business Administration, BS and Data Analytics Graduate Certificate may be relevant for students comparing business and analytics pathways.
excerpt: The Accounting, BS program builds practical knowledge in financial reporting, managerial accounting, taxation, auditing concepts, and business decision-making.

title: Artificial Intelligence, BS
markdown_content:
# Artificial Intelligence, BS

The Artificial Intelligence, BS program introduces computing, data, and machine-learning foundations while keeping ethics and communication at the center of technical work.

## Program overview

Students study programming, data preparation, model evaluation, and responsible AI use. Projects ask students to explain how a model was built, what it can and cannot support, and how results should be communicated.

## What you will study

- Programming and problem solving
- Data structures and data preparation
- Machine-learning foundations
- Model evaluation and bias awareness
- Human-centered AI applications

## Format and pacing

Online and campus options are available. Students with prior computing coursework should request transfer review early because sequencing matters in programming and math-heavy courses.

## Related programs

Software Engineering, BS; Cybersecurity, BS; and Data Analytics Graduate Certificate are common comparison points.
excerpt: The Artificial Intelligence, BS program introduces computing, data, and machine-learning foundations while keeping ethics and communication at the center of technical work.

title: Artificial Intelligence, MS
markdown_content:
# Artificial Intelligence, MS

The Artificial Intelligence, MS program focuses on applied machine learning, intelligent systems, data governance, and model communication for professional environments.

## Program overview

Students deepen technical knowledge while practicing how to evaluate limitations, manage data responsibly, and explain model behavior to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

## What you will study

- Applied machine learning
- Data engineering for AI projects
- Natural language and decision systems
- Model evaluation and governance
- Responsible AI leadership

## Format and pacing

The program is offered online. Students without recent programming or statistics preparation may be advised to complete foundational coursework before advanced AI classes.

## Related programs

Software Engineering, MS and Data Analytics Graduate Certificate may be useful alternatives depending on the student's goals.
excerpt: The Artificial Intelligence, MS program focuses on applied machine learning, intelligent systems, data governance, and model communication for professional environments.

title: Business Administration, BS
markdown_content:
# Business Administration, BS

The Business Administration, BS program prepares students to understand organizations, markets, operations, and data-informed management decisions.

## Program overview

Students build a foundation in management, accounting, marketing, finance, operations, and business communication. Applied assignments ask students to analyze realistic organizational situations.

## What you will study

- Management and organizational behavior
- Marketing and customer strategy
- Financial and managerial decision-making
- Operations and process improvement
- Business ethics and communication

## Format and pacing

Online and campus options are available. Transfer students often bring business or general education credits, so transcript review is important before estimating time to completion.

## Related programs

Accounting, BS; Digital Marketing, BS; and Business Administration, MBA are common next comparisons.
excerpt: The Business Administration, BS program prepares students to understand organizations, markets, operations, and data-informed management decisions.

title: Clinical Mental Health Counseling, MS
markdown_content:
# Clinical Mental Health Counseling, MS

The Clinical Mental Health Counseling, MS program prepares students for advanced study in counseling theory, helping relationships, assessment, ethics, and supervised field experience.

## Program overview

The curriculum is structured in a deliberate sequence. Students complete foundational counseling courses before field-experience courses, and they should plan for supervised practice requirements that may affect scheduling.

## What you will study

- Counseling theories and helping skills
- Human development and assessment
- Group counseling and crisis response
- Ethics, diversity, and professional identity
- Practicum and internship preparation

## Format and pacing

The program is primarily online with required synchronous and field-experience components. Students should discuss state expectations and field-placement planning before choosing a start date.

## Licensure note

This program is designed to support educational preparation for counseling licensure, but licensure requirements vary by state. Students must review state requirements and speak with Admissions about their intended state of practice.
excerpt: The Clinical Mental Health Counseling, MS program prepares students for advanced study in counseling theory, helping relationships, assessment, ethics, and supervised field experience.

title: Cybersecurity, BS
markdown_content:
# Cybersecurity, BS

The Cybersecurity, BS program focuses on protecting systems, understanding risk, and communicating security decisions clearly.

## Program overview

Students learn computing foundations, network defense, secure design, incident response concepts, and governance basics. Coursework emphasizes responsible technology practice.

## What you will study

- Network and systems security
- Secure software concepts
- Risk management and governance
- Incident response planning
- Privacy and ethics

## Format and pacing

Online and campus options are available. Prior college credit in computing, networking, or math may affect course placement.

## Related programs

Software Engineering, BS; Artificial Intelligence, BS; and Cybersecurity, MS are common comparison points.
excerpt: The Cybersecurity, BS program focuses on protecting systems, understanding risk, and communicating security decisions clearly.

title: Cybersecurity, MS
markdown_content:
# Cybersecurity, MS

The Cybersecurity, MS program develops advanced capability in security architecture, governance, incident analysis, and organizational risk.

## Program overview

Students study how technical controls, policy, people, and business priorities intersect. Projects require students to evaluate risk and recommend practical improvements.

## What you will study

- Security architecture
- Risk and compliance strategy
- Cloud and application security
- Incident analysis
- Executive communication for security decisions

## Format and pacing

The program is offered online. Students should be prepared for technical reading, writing, and scenario-based analysis.

## Related programs

Software Engineering, MS and Artificial Intelligence, MS may be relevant for students comparing advanced technology programs.
excerpt: The Cybersecurity, MS program develops advanced capability in security architecture, governance, incident analysis, and organizational risk.

title: Data Analytics Graduate Certificate
markdown_content:
# Data Analytics Graduate Certificate

The Data Analytics Graduate Certificate helps students build focused skills in data preparation, analysis, visualization, and decision support.

## Program overview

The certificate is designed for students who want graduate-level analytics study without committing immediately to a full master's degree.

## What you will study

- Data preparation and quality
- Applied statistics for decision-making
- Dashboard design and visualization
- Analytics storytelling
- Responsible use of data

## Format and pacing

The certificate is offered online. Some courses may apply to related graduate programs when catalog rules allow.

## Related programs

Business Administration, MBA; Artificial Intelligence, MS; and Software Engineering, MS are common next-step conversations.
excerpt: The Data Analytics Graduate Certificate helps students build focused skills in data preparation, analysis, visualization, and decision support.

title: Digital Marketing, BS
markdown_content:
# Digital Marketing, BS

The Digital Marketing, BS program combines business fundamentals, audience research, content strategy, analytics, and ethical communication.

## Program overview

Students learn to plan campaigns, measure performance, and explain how marketing decisions connect to organizational goals.

## What you will study

- Audience research and segmentation
- Content strategy and brand voice
- Campaign analytics
- Consumer behavior
- Responsible digital communication

## Format and pacing

Online and campus options are available. Students interested in creative production may also compare Graphic Design, BFA.

## Related programs

Business Administration, BS; Graphic Design, BFA; and Digital Marketing, MS may be relevant.
excerpt: The Digital Marketing, BS program combines business fundamentals, audience research, content strategy, analytics, and ethical communication.

title: Digital Marketing, MS
markdown_content:
# Digital Marketing, MS

The Digital Marketing, MS program advances strategic marketing, analytics, campaign design, and leadership communication.

## Program overview

Students examine how organizations use audience insight, performance measurement, and integrated campaigns to make marketing decisions.

## What you will study

- Advanced marketing analytics
- Integrated campaign strategy
- Customer journey measurement
- Digital brand governance
- Marketing leadership communication

## Format and pacing

The program is offered online. Students should expect applied projects and writing-intensive analysis.

## Related programs

Business Administration, MBA and Data Analytics Graduate Certificate are common comparisons.
excerpt: The Digital Marketing, MS program advances strategic marketing, analytics, campaign design, and leadership communication.

title: Graphic Design, BFA
markdown_content:
# Graphic Design, BFA

The Graphic Design, BFA program develops visual communication, design research, typography, critique, and portfolio development.

## Program overview

Students create design systems across digital and print contexts. Studio work emphasizes clear visual reasoning, iteration, and presentation.

## What you will study

- Typography and layout
- Brand identity systems
- Design research and critique
- Digital production workflows
- Portfolio development

## Format and pacing

The program is campus-based with selected hybrid coursework. Students should plan for studio time and portfolio checkpoints.

## Related programs

Digital Marketing, BS and Communication electives may be relevant for students interested in creative strategy.
excerpt: The Graphic Design, BFA program develops visual communication, design research, typography, critique, and portfolio development.

title: Human Services, BS
markdown_content:
# Human Services, BS

The Human Services, BS program introduces students to helping systems, community resources, case planning, ethics, and advocacy.

## Program overview

Students study how individuals and families navigate social, educational, health, and community-support systems. Coursework emphasizes documentation, referral skills, and ethical boundaries.

## What you will study

- Human services systems
- Case planning and documentation
- Crisis and referral basics
- Ethics and professional boundaries
- Community-program evaluation

## Format and pacing

The program is offered online. Students interested in graduate counseling should compare this program with Clinical Mental Health Counseling, MS expectations.

## Related programs

Public Health, BS; Public Health, MPH; and Clinical Mental Health Counseling, MS may be relevant.
excerpt: The Human Services, BS program introduces students to helping systems, community resources, case planning, ethics, and advocacy.

title: Business Administration, MBA
markdown_content:
# Business Administration, MBA

The Business Administration, MBA program is designed for students who want to strengthen leadership, strategy, analytics, and cross-functional decision-making.

## Program overview

The MBA uses case analysis, group discussion, applied projects, and a capstone to connect finance, marketing, operations, leadership, and analytics.

## What you will study

- Strategic management
- Managerial finance and accounting
- Operations and project decision-making
- Marketing strategy and analytics
- Leadership, ethics, and organizational change

## Format and pacing

The MBA is offered online. Students typically take one course per accelerated graduate term unless advising approves a different load.

## Related programs

Data Analytics Graduate Certificate, Digital Marketing, MS, and Public Health, MPH may be relevant for students comparing leadership-focused graduate options.
excerpt: The Business Administration, MBA program is designed for students who want to strengthen leadership, strategy, analytics, and cross-functional decision-making.

title: Public Health, BS
markdown_content:
# Public Health, BS

The Public Health, BS program introduces population health, prevention, program planning, and communication for community settings.

## Program overview

Students learn how social, environmental, and organizational factors influence health outcomes. Assignments include data interpretation and community-health planning.

## What you will study

- Foundations of public health
- Community health and prevention
- Health systems and policy basics
- Data and program evaluation
- Health communication

## Format and pacing

The program is offered online and on campus. Transfer coursework in biology, statistics, or social science may be reviewed for applicability.

## Related programs

Human Services, BS and Public Health, MPH are common comparison points.
excerpt: The Public Health, BS program introduces population health, prevention, program planning, and communication for community settings.

title: Public Health, MPH
markdown_content:
# Public Health, MPH

The Public Health, MPH program focuses on population health, epidemiology, program planning, health policy, and evaluation.

## Program overview

Students learn to interpret data, design interventions, and communicate recommendations for complex community-health needs.

## What you will study

- Epidemiology and biostatistics
- Health policy and systems
- Program planning and evaluation
- Community assessment
- Ethical public-health practice

## Format and pacing

The program is offered online. Students should expect research reading, writing, data interpretation, and a culminating applied project.

## Related programs

Human Services, BS; Business Administration, MBA; and Data Analytics Graduate Certificate may be useful comparisons depending on goals.
excerpt: The Public Health, MPH program focuses on population health, epidemiology, program planning, health policy, and evaluation.

title: Software Engineering, BS
markdown_content:
# Software Engineering, BS

The Software Engineering, BS program prepares students to design, build, test, and maintain software systems.

## Program overview

Students learn programming, algorithms, design, testing, databases, and collaborative project workflows.

## What you will study

- Programming and software design
- Data structures and algorithms
- Databases and web systems
- Testing and quality practices
- Team project delivery

## Format and pacing

Online and campus options are available. Students with transfer credit in programming should request review before choosing a course sequence.

## Related programs

Artificial Intelligence, BS; Cybersecurity, BS; and Software Engineering, MS are common comparisons.
excerpt: The Software Engineering, BS program prepares students to design, build, test, and maintain software systems.

title: Software Engineering, MS
markdown_content:
# Software Engineering, MS

The Software Engineering, MS program focuses on architecture, scalable systems, quality, cloud concepts, and technical leadership.

## Program overview

Students study how to design and maintain complex systems while communicating tradeoffs across technical and organizational teams.

## What you will study

- Software architecture
- Cloud and distributed systems
- Quality engineering
- Secure development practices
- Technical project leadership

## Format and pacing

The program is offered online. Students should expect team-oriented projects and architecture-focused writing.

## Related programs

Artificial Intelligence, MS; Cybersecurity, MS; and Data Analytics Graduate Certificate may be relevant.
excerpt: The Software Engineering, MS program focuses on architecture, scalable systems, quality, cloud concepts, and technical leadership.

title: Teaching English Language Learners Graduate Certificate
markdown_content:
# Teaching English Language Learners Graduate Certificate

The Teaching English Language Learners Graduate Certificate supports educators who work with multilingual learners in classrooms and community settings.

## Program overview

Students study language development, inclusive instruction, assessment, and family engagement. The certificate is not a blanket licensure guarantee; students should confirm requirements in their state or district.

## What you will study

- Language acquisition
- Literacy and content-area support
- Assessment and progress monitoring
- Family and community engagement
- Culturally responsive instruction

## Format and pacing

The certificate is offered online. It may be useful for teachers, instructional coaches, and education-support professionals.

## Related programs

Education electives and Human Services, BS may be relevant depending on the student's role.
excerpt: The Teaching English Language Learners Graduate Certificate supports educators who work with multilingual learners in classrooms and community settings.
